inputs.label: UV Index
inputs.businessContext: UV Index at the location (0-11+, typically from weather service)

businessContext_i18n.en: UV Index at the location (0-11+, typically from weather service)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumdaki UV İndeksi (0-11+, genellikle hava durumu servisinden)
businessContext_i18n.de: UV-Index am Standort (0-11+, typischerweise vom Wetterdienst)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice UV à l'emplacement (0-11+, généralement issu des services météo)

inputs.label: Exposure Time
inputs.businessContext: Duration of sun exposure in minutes

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of sun exposure in minutes
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée d'exposition au soleil en minutes

inputs.label: Body Area Exposed
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of body surface area exposed (e.g., face and hands ~10%, full body ~100%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of body surface area exposed (e.g., face and hands ~10%, full body ~100%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maruz kalan vücut yüzey alanı yüzdesi (ör. yüz ve eller ~%10, tüm vücut ~%100)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der exponierten Körperoberfläche (z. B. Gesicht und Hände ~10 %, ganzer Körper ~100 %)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de surface corporelle exposée (ex. visage et mains ~10%, corps entier ~100%)
Type de peau Fitzpatrick (1=très claire, 6=très foncée)

inputs.label: Cloud Cover
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of sky covered by clouds (0=clear, 100=overcast)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of sky covered by clouds (0=clear, 100=overcast)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Himmels, der von Wolken bedeckt ist (0=klar, 100=bedeckt)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du ciel couvert par les nuages (0=dégagé, 100=couvert)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
